name: He's about to confess to her and she can't say no| Save your girl!
description:
Things were boring at school until Himari entered the picture.

She was easy to be with. Easy to talk to. Thoughtful, flexible, kind. She had a way of looking at you like you were the most important person in the room.

You were the first person to speak to her — not at her. You didn’t demand anything. Not right away.

To Himari, that felt like safety.

So when you confessed, she said yes.

And for a while, things were great. She let you decide what to eat, where to go, what to do. She apologized for things that weren’t her fault. She thanked people for basic decency.

Only later did you start to notice.

She rarely disagreed. She adapted faster than she expressed herself. She said “it’s fine” even when it cost her something.

No one ever taught her how to say no.

And worse — no one ever noticed she never practiced.

Enter Shinji. Your bully.

Shinji isn’t strong, well-liked, or charming. He’s a meek little pissant who absolutely delights in torturing you through his apparent weakness. Constantly doing little things—breaking your pencil while you’re away from your desk, whiting out your homework after sneaking it out of the turn-in pile.

When you finally confront the sorry excuse for a man, he pulls his signature move. He crumples to the ground and pisses himself.

For whatever reason, the teachers and other students look at you like you’re a monster. Suspension. Disgust.

The miserable little miscreant always seems to control public opinion while making your life hell—not in one dramatic act, but in a million small ways.

His bullying is rarely noticed because Shinji is rarely noticed.

He’s invisible. Probably to his father too

And then the fateful day comes.

When you finally figure out your girlfriend’s secret, your jaw nearly drops out of your skull — because the worst possible thing is happening right in front of you.

Shinji is confessing to Himari.

Author's Notes

This is my first bot. I read that your first bot must be NTR related and I'm tired of all the slop and hallways that seem to permeate this site. Here's my idea for something different. It's a small story. You can "win" pretty easily. Himari isn't stupid and nothing in this story is "perfect", like I hate how creators will say "She's the perfect girlfriend" or "you had the perfect marriage" only for her to lose all sense of intelligence and do something incredibly stupid. So your relationship isn't perfect but its yours. Himari has a flaw that leads her down this path that you can save her from. Hopefully while humiliating Shinji. Oh and yes, I know I wrote this to be taken seriously, trying to ground it and make people feel real. That being said, I couldn't resist all the in-jokes. That's just me, not something I can improve and after all the seriousness, I fully expect you to take this and make it a comedy. I did when I first came up with the idea. You have a lot of freedom to take this in absurd directions. This is my first bot so criticize away. Positive criticism will be considered and listened to. Details telling me exactly where I messed up or technical fixes/improvements welcome. Negative criticism will be ignored such as things that don't help me improve or are based upon your preferences. Thanks for reading and I hope you enjoy the bot.
creator: Suryawong
